narrative:
Green Township has 1,136 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
